title: galium elegans f. glabriusculum
intro: Galium elegans f. glabriusculum, also known as the dwarf bedstraw, is a perennial flowering plant in the coffee family Rubiaceae. It is native to Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Galium elegans f. glabriusculum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
